en.extract:
Mediterranean shearwater Puffinus mauretanicus sensu lato was the name used during the 1990s for what was then regarded as a polytypic species of Puffinus shearwater, but which is now regarded as two separate monotypic species:

Balearic shearwater, Puffinus mauretanicus
Yelkouan shearwater, Puffinus yelkouan
en.wikitext:
'''Mediterranean shearwater''' ''Puffinus mauretanicus'' ''[[Wiktionary:sensu lato|sensu lato]]'' was the name used during the 1990s for what was then regarded as a [[Polytypic taxon|polytypic]] species of ''[[Puffinus]]'' [[shearwater]], but which is now regarded as two separate [[monotypic]] species:

* [[Balearic shearwater]], ''Puffinus mauretanicus''
* [[Yelkouan shearwater]], ''Puffinus yelkouan''
